query: Design the VPC segmentation for a Singapore government e-service on GCC: public, app, and data subnet tiers with security groups between them and controlled egress.
Our agency's security groups allow 0.0.0.0/0 ingress on several ports and all egress. Rework the rules to deny by default and allow by exception under the IM8 network controls.
Put a WAF, DDoS protection, and a CDN in front of our agency's public-facing portal per the ICT&SS network security requirements.
Wire up AWS PrivateLink and VPC endpoints so our agency's private subnets reach S3 and DynamoDB without traversing the internet.
Set up mTLS between the microservices of our GCC workload with a service mesh so inter-service calls are authenticated, authorised, and encrypted.
Our .gov.sg service's TLS certificate expired in production last month. Move to managed certificates with auto-renewal and expiry alerts.
Connect our agency's on-premises data centre to our GCC cloud environment through a secure intermediary instead of pushing files over the public internet.
Deploy an IDS/IPS to inspect traffic between our agency's network and untrusted networks, and route the detections to an owner.
Send real-time alerts to appointed administrators whenever firewall or security-group rules change in our agency's AWS environment.
Lock down remote VPN access for the vendors administering our agency's private network: MFA, managed devices, periodic re-authentication, and no split tunneling.
Harden our agency's container images: digest-pinned minimal base, non-root user, read-only root filesystem, image scanning, and a private registry.
Pin our agency's data to ap-southeast-1, block cross-region replication, and set up witnessed destruction of the retired storage disks.
Set up tamper-resistant off-box security log storage with 365-day retention and GCSOC forwarding for our agency system.
Configure GitHub Actions with SAST, secret scanning, SBOM generation, and artifact signing for our agency's repository.
Fix the IAM wildcard roles, enforce MFA on officer accounts, and clean up dormant accounts across our agency's AWS organisation.
Publish an RFC 9116 security.txt, stand up the vulnerability disclosure programme, and define severity-based remediation SLAs for our agency.
Which System Security Plan applies to our new agency service, and what are its Level 0 controls?
Integrate Singpass login with PAR and DPoP into our citizen-facing portal, including Myinfo pre-fill.
Set up an nginx reverse proxy with a Let's Encrypt certificate for my personal blog on a cheap VPS.
Add parameterised queries, input validation, and salted password hashing to our agency application's login code.
